Boons: Party automatically wins the next initiative.
Resting here will not advance any clocks.

sources: Beautiful scenery that remains almost untouched for centuries.
Ruins of a village that tells the story of an old war.
Striking flowers or delicious fruits that only exist here.
Mythical creature passing through, singing a mysterious melody.
Rare group of animals in the middle of their migratory path.
A dark cave with incredibly rare gems.
Veils of color cross the sky that only a few people can see.
A meteor shower that only happens once every 50 years.
Remnants of temporal magic that gives a vision of the past.
A statue of an old, forgotten hero.
Scents coming from a plant that is used to make perfume.
Musicians on the trail perform a traditional song.
